title: Funnychip's Utils
description: Orange Cobwebs, Smile Golden Apples or i guess chips, apples are now Fapples, and many more
body: This is a PVP resourcepack but its not something like recolored armor and some crap. Its just stupid, so i made my own resource pack. Im FunnyChip and i made this resourcepack for my style. Fully allowed to edit and publish wherever you want, sell it, i dont care, but please put the main link for the original version if you did. Golden apples have A smile face on them, cobwebs turned orange. Soon will be making a fishing bobber, and maybe crystals, anchors.
